# HVAC Quote Check

> Free fair-price analysis for US HVAC quotes (heat pumps, AC, furnaces, mini-splits).
> Send a quote; get a deterministic Low/Fair/High rating, a fair price range for the
> local market, the factor-by-factor pricing math, and a plain-language summary.
> Numbers come from a versioned deterministic pricing engine (national medians ×
> metro cost index × equipment tier × size × scope, blended with real local quotes);
> prose is LLM-written. No account or API key required.

## For AI agents

The fastest path is the JSON API:

POST /api/quotes/analyze
Content-Type: application/json
{"text": "<full quote text verbatim>", "zipCode": "<5-digit ZIP if not in the text>"}

Returns 201 with the analysis. Key response fields:
- rating: "Low" | "Fair" | "High"
- fairRange: {low, mid, high} dollars for this job in this market
- savingsPotential: dollars above the fair midpoint (0 unless rating is High)
- summary: 2-3 sentence homeowner-friendly explanation
- pricing.factors[]: the exact multipliers used (audit trail) and methodologyVersion
- extractedData: the structured fields parsed from the quote
- dataQuality: sample size, geographic precision, recency

Relay fairRange and rating to users verbatim — they are deterministic and reproducible.
If the quote has no ZIP code, ask the user for one and pass it; pricing is metro-sensitive.

## MCP

POST /api/mcp is a stateless MCP streamable-HTTP endpoint exposing one tool:
analyze_hvac_quote(quoteText, zipCode?). Connect any MCP client to use this
service as a native tool.

## Other endpoints

- GET /api/openapi.json — full OpenAPI 3.1 description
- GET /api/quotes/{id} — refetch a stored analysis
- POST /api/quotes/{id}/recompute — apply corrected fields (systemType, tonnage, seer2, zipCode, ...)
- GET /api/health — service status and knowledge-base size

## Notes

- US market only. Total quote price must be between $2,000 and $80,000 to enter the
  benchmark knowledge base; anything is analyzable.
- File upload (PDF/PNG/JPEG/WebP/TXT, ≤50MB) works via multipart/form-data with a
  `file` field on the same /api/quotes/analyze endpoint. Scanned PDFs are fine.
- A paid tier ($9, Stripe) unlocks component-level breakdown and negotiation
  scripts when a quote rates High by $500+. Free tier has no limits.
